overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a rural dirt path through farmland with sunflower fields, transitioning through rocky wooded areas and open grasslands toward a distant cottage. The clip features bright summer lighting and follows the character as he trails an NPC peasant through the countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmland path with sunflower field

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path, following an NPC peasant ahead through the farmland

notable_agents.action: peasant walking ahead on the path, leading the way through the sunflower field

entered.detail: dense field of tall yellow sunflowers lining the right side of the path
freshly tilled dark earth agricultural field on the left side
simple wooden fence posts marking the edge of the plowed field

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sun-drenched dirt path bordered by a vibrant sunflower field on the right and a freshly plowed field on the left. An NPC peasant walks ahead, leading the way through the open farmland under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky wooded trail with scattered boulders

events.description: path curves left leaving the sunflower field behind and enters a rockier, more wooded area with partial tree cover

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path through an area with large rocks and denser tree coverage

notable_agents.action: peasant continuing to walk ahead through the rocky section of the trail

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders and rock formations scattered along the path edges
tall leafy trees providing partial shade over the path

segments.scene_description: The path transitions into a rockier, partially shaded area as trees close in overhead. Large boulders line the dirt trail while Geralt follows the NPC through this more enclosed woodland section, with dappled sunlight filtering through the leaves.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path approaching rural cottage

events.description: distant wooden cottage becomes visible ahead at the end of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through open grasslands with the NPC ahead, approaching a distant building in the clearing

notable_agents.action: peasant walking toward the distant cottage at the path's end

entered.detail: tall green grass and wildflowers covering the open fields on both sides of the path
narrow waterway or marshy area running parallel to the path on the right
small rustic wooden house with thatched roof visible in the distance at the path's end

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up into wide grasslands with tall meadows on either side. A small stream runs parallel to the path on the right as Geralt and the NPC approach a distant wooden cottage visible at the path's end, surrounded by scattered trees under the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright rural landscape that transitions from open farmland into a shaded woodland before opening onto a wide meadow. It begins on a sun-drenched dirt path bordered by vibrant sunflowers and freshly plowed fields as Geralt follows a peasant under a bright blue sky. As the path narrows, the environment shifts into a rockier, enclosed woodland where large boulders line the trail and dappled sunlight filters through an overhead canopy of trees. The scene then expands as the trail opens back up into wide grasslands with tall meadows and a small stream running parallel to the path. Finally, the camera moves toward a distant wooden cottage nestled among scattered trees under the bright midday sun.
